parameters.name: min_confidence
parameters.description: Minimum BirdNET confidence score to retain a detection

parameters.name: top_n
parameters.description: Number of top-scoring candidates to retain per clip (NULL = keep all)

parameters.name: rank_system
parameters.description: Taxonomic rank columns expected in BirdNET output

parameters.name: min_score
parameters.description: Minimum score to include a detection in consensus

parameters.name: max_gap
parameters.description: Minimum score gap between top two candidates to declare a clip resolved

parameters.name: rank_thresholds
parameters.description: Named vector of minimum scores per rank (NULL = no rank-specific thresholds)
